title: memory size is not correct when imported from Verific netlist

features.name: unpacked memory array with non-power-of-2 size
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array declaration where the number of words is not a power of 2 (e.g., 33 words instead of 32 or 64)

features.name: memory access with wide address input
features.description: Code should include memory read and write operations using an address input that is wider than needed for the actual memory depth

features.name: byte-write enable on memory operation
features.description: Code should include a memory write operation where data is masked with a byte-write enable signal before writing
